summary: Systems architecture review accepts the bounded M6 Alpha system-complete contract. The actual branch diff remains planning/process-only, the contract satisfies the requested start-to-victory criteria, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and Human Gates, and does not introduce product code, package code, content-source data, tools, CI, roadmap, ADR, Gate, acceptance-matrix, or release-artifact changes.

tests_run.result: On design/m6-alpha-system-contract tracking origin/design/m6-alpha-system-contract; untracked ui-samples/ is present and was left untouched.
Branch contains 69205ffd start, 5d4e349e contract definition, and 3ce71518 review routing; reviewed current HEAD and the writer review commit.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-status $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)..HEAD plus forbidden-path guard
tests_run.result: Changed files are PROJECT_STATUS.md, project goal/model routing state, thread registry, task JSON, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION, and M6 Alpha contract messages/routes only; no forbidden paths matched.
M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is REVIEW; M6-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED; downstream M6 tasks remain DRAFT.
No READY tasks printed while M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001 is in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape and M6 mapping check for M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001
tests_run.result: OK: required contract sections present; 8 player decisions include advantage/cost/dependencies/counter; M1-M5 mapping covers M1 through M5; M6 DAG mapping covers all 14 downstream non-graph M6 tasks; Human Gate false; DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preserved.

tests_run.command: git diff --check $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main)..HEAD; git diff --check
tests_run.result: No whitespace errors in committed branch diff or current working-tree diff.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON.parse checks for goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION, thread-registry, and route files
tests_run.result: All checked process JSON files parsed successfully.

tests_run.command: rg "manual node battle|DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE|Manual node battle" -n project/tasks/active -g "M6-*.json"
tests_run.result: Manual-node-battle mentions in M6 task files are deferral, exclusion, or Human Gate guard statements; no M6/M7/M8 implementation, spike, research, validation, or exit-gate dependency was found.

decisions: ACCEPT: The contract remains planning-only and changes only allowed task/status/message/process files.

ACCEPT: The contract defines start conditions, one accepted recognized-order victory condition, failure conditions, evidence requirements, no-placeholder major-system expectations, M1-M5 mapping, and complete M6 DAG mapping.

ACCEPT: Architecture boundaries are preserved: authoritative WorldState remains with Worker/Runner simulation authority, UI consumes read models and does not own WorldState, sim-core remains decoupled from React/Pixi/Electron/Node IO/real time, and player/AI actions use the same command surface.

ACCEPT: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is preserved as a deferral/exclusion/post-1.0 candidate boundary and is not introduced as M6, M7, or M8 implementation, spike, research, validation, or exit-gate work.

ACCEPT: Human Gates remain explicit for frozen product/platform/core architecture, paid services/accounts/secrets, server/multiplayer, telemetry/remote collection, arbitrary-code mods, commercial/branding decisions, major cultural-risk decisions, irreversible migration, and formal 1.0 scope reversal.
ACCEPT: No public architecture decision, formal historical/cultural content lock, hidden scope drift, fabricated evidence, dependency change, or release artifact was found.
risks: Untracked ui-samples/ exists in the worktree and was not reviewed as part of this branch diff.
The project-git-workflow Status.cmd wrapper is not initialized for this repository, so direct git commands were used for read-only review evidence.

The route file records writer review commit 5d4e349e; current HEAD is 3ce71518 because the lead added the systems review routing commit. This review covered current HEAD and the writer source handoff.
requested_action: Lead may treat systems_architect review as ACCEPT and continue the required orchestration/review flow for M6-ALPHA-SYSTEM-CONTRACT-001. No systems-side changes are required.
